tests.name: test_final_state.py::test_account_step_advances_to_profile
tests.trace:
alice_registration = {'account': <Response [200]>, 'profile': <Response [200]>, 'review_html': 'Not a SSR URL according to Qwik City', 'session': <requests.sessions.Session object at 0x7f6da9895be0>, ...}

    def test_account_step_advances_to_profile(alice_registration):

        assert resp.status_code == 200, (
            f"Account submission returned {resp.status_code}, body: {resp.text[:500]}"

tests.name: test_final_state.py::test_email_uniqueness_rejected
tests.trace:
alice_registration = {'account': <Response [200]>, 'profile': <Response [200]>, 'review_html': 'Not a SSR URL according to Qwik City', 'session': <requests.sessions.Session object at 0x7f6da9895be0>, ...}

    def test_email_uniqueness_rejected(alice_registration):
        session = requests.Session()
        resp = submit_step(
            session,
            ACCOUNT_URL,
            {
                "email": "alice@verify.test",
                "password": "Str0ngPass",
                "confirmPassword": "Str0ngPass",
            },
        )
        assert resp.status_code == 200
        assert path_of(resp.url) == "/register", (
            "Registering an already-used email must NOT advance to the profile step; "
            f"ended at {resp.url}"
        )
>       assert 'name="email"' in resp.text, (
            "Account step should re-render its form on a uniqueness failure."
        )
E       AssertionError: Account step should re-render its form on a uniqueness failure.
E       assert 'name="email"' in 'Not a SSR URL according to Qwik City'
E        +  where 'Not a SSR URL according to Qwik City' = <Response [200]>.text
